query:
SELECT s1.externalId AS sasboss_id, s2.externalId AS real_id, s1.customerExternalId
FROM services s1
JOIN services s2 ON s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId
  AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId)
  AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sx.externalId) FROM services sx WHERE sx.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId AND sx.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND sx.serviceType = 'Internet') = 1
ORDER BY s1.externalId;

  AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId)
  AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sx.externalId) FROM services sx WHERE sx.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId AND sx.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND sx.serviceType = 'Internet') = 1
ORDER BY s1.externalId;
